3108940.name: Warrior Architects Demo
3108940.description: The story of this game revolves around the grand adventure of warriors. Along their journey, they encounter various villages and tribes, and collaborate with them to develop small villages into large fortresses. Throughout their adventure, they face different challenges and attacks from bandits and wild beasts. To protect the tribes from these assaults, the warriors work with the villagers to build walls, towers, and other defensive structures, fending off external threats. Through these efforts, the warriors earn the trust of different tribes.
3108940.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 繁体中文
